name: @a5c-ai/agent-catalog
description: Shared ontology and discovery catalog for harness agents, model providers, transports, hooks, capabilities, and process evidence.

scripts.build: npm run generate:evidence && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run validate:graph
scripts.test: npm run generate:evidence && npm run validate:graph && cd ../.. && npm run test:agent-catalog-contracts
scripts.ci:test: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.ci:staging: npm run ci:test && npm run version:check
